name: SHAKER's Plugin Repository

description: Collection of streaming plugins for Umbrella - Movies, TV Shows, and Anime

plugins.name: AnimeVilla
plugins.author: SHAKER
plugins.changelog: v1 - Initial release with search, categories, and anime content
plugins.readme: AnimeVilla plugin for Umbrella. Browse Hindi dubbed anime.

plugins.name: VegaMovies
plugins.author: SHAKER
plugins.changelog: v1 - Initial release with search, categories, movies and TV shows
plugins.readme: VegaMovies plugin for Umbrella. Browse and download movies.

plugins.name: MoviesMod
plugins.author: SHAKER
plugins.description: Latest movies and TV shows from MoviesMod

plugins.name: BollyFlix

plugins.name: MoviesDrive

plugins.readme: MoviesDrive plugin for Umbrella. Browse movies with download links.

plugins.name: NetflixMirror

plugins.readme: NetflixMirror plugin for Umbrella. Stream from Netflix mirror.

plugins.name: CineStream
